Arsa Stark
Wylla Fenn, Arsa Stark, Alys Karstark by coldraindropsss
Allegiance House Stark
Culture Northmen
Born 173–213 AC[1]
Father Brandon Stark
Mother Alys Karstark
Book The World of Ice & Fire (appendix)

Arsa Stark was a noblewoman from House Stark during the latter half of the second century after Aegon's Conquest. She was the only daughter of Lord Brandon Stark and his wife, Lady Alys Karstark. Arsa had two full older brothers, Rodwell and Beron and an older bastard brother as well, Lonnel Snow.[2][3]
